game: MIKLAT UNIVERSAL — arcade-wide cast + UI kit
style: One shared style: vibrant 3D cartoon, thick outlines, app-store polish. Cast bibles are canonical (DESIGN-SYSTEM.md) — these sheets are the reference every game pack copies. Sprites on FLAT MAGENTA #ff00ff edge to edge, no ground shadow, no text. Generate: bin/imagepack assets/universal

images.prompt: Game character reference sheet, vibrant 3D cartoon, thick outlines: SAVTA — a feisty Israeli grandmother, short gray curls, floral dress, beige cardigan, wheeled shopping cart at her side, one slipper raised in her hand, expression of loving menace. Full body, centered, feet near bottom. ENTIRE background flat solid magenta #ff00ff, edge to edge, no shadow, no text.

Full body, centered, feet near bottom. ENTIRE background flat solid magenta #ff00ff, edge to edge, no shadow, no text.

Brand key art, vibrant 3D cartoon style: a cozy underground shelter room at night converted into a glowing retro arcade — string lights, a worn couch, an old CRT cabinet glowing gold, game posters on concrete walls, a wicker basket and a lime scooter parked in the corner, warm gold light against deep navy shadows #0d1120 and #ffd166. Inviting, safe, alive. No people, no text, clean upper-center area for overlay logo.
